CustomField.description: Negotiated top-up amount that lessor will contribute to the claim payout, which is set to a precision of six decimal places. However, the Contribution Balance Starting field, which has a precision of two decimal places, always supersedes this precise field (keep it blank if you need more precision).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Negotiated top-up amount that lessor will contribute to the claim payout, which is set to a precision of six decimal places. However, the Contribution Balance Starting field, which has a precision of two decimal places, always supersedes this precise field (keep it blank if you need more precision)
CustomField.label: Contribution Balance Starting (Precise)
